problem: Healthcare providers struggle with manual patient check-in processes, paper forms, staff shortages, and time-consuming administrative tasks like registration, insurance verification, and payment collection that create bottlenecks and reduce staff efficiency.
solution: AI-powered patient intake platform offering mobile check-in, automated reminders, digital pre-registration, insurance verification, consent collection, copay collection, and post-visit surveys. Enables patients to self-check-in (88%+ adoption) and eliminates thousands of phone calls monthly.
